# NAIF Vendor Files

This directory vendors NAIF kernel files used for Aster research and validation work.

## pck00010.tpc

- Source URL: `https://naif.jpl.nasa.gov/pub/naif/generic_kernels/pck/pck00010.tpc`
- Download date: `2026-04-26`
- Contents: NAIF text planetary constants kernel containing body orientation and shape constants, including `BODY*_RADII` entries for the Sun, planets, and major moons
- Usage: research and validation input for V2/Slice 2 body constants and frame work
- License / status: NASA / JPL NAIF public-domain distribution
